assertions.title: Login begin returns assertion options for the implemented registered-passkey flow on draft.choir-ip.com

steps.action: Run Playwright test 'passkey login returns assertion options and creates session'
steps.expected: Test passes, proving login returns correct assertion options and establishes a session

assertions.title: Invalid, stale, or replayed finish payloads fail closed and do not mint a session

steps.action: Run Playwright test 'replayed registration finish payload does not create a session'
steps.expected: Test passes, proving replayed finish payload is rejected and does not mint a session

assertions.title: Authenticated session inspection returns current user identity without secrets

steps.action: Run Playwright test 'authenticated /auth/session returns user identity without secrets'
steps.expected: Test passes, proving session endpoint returns identity without leaking secrets

assertions.title: Logout invalidates access and refresh state and is safe to repeat

steps.action: Run Playwright test 'logout invalidates session and is safe to repeat'
steps.expected: Test passes, proving logout works and can be called multiple times without error

summary: Tested 4 assertions (VAL-AUTH-005 to 008) via Playwright virtual-authenticator harness. All 4 tests passed, confirming the behavior of passkey login, replayed payload handling, session inspection, and logout.
